mapper.select: SELECT t.*, c.name AS course_name FROM training_task t LEFT JOIN course c ON t.course_id = c.id ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
SELECT t.*, c.name AS course_name FROM training_task t LEFT JOIN course c ON t.course_id = c.id WHERE (t.deadline IS NULL OR t.deadline >= NOW()) AND t.status = 1 ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
SELECT t.*, c.name AS course_name FROM training_task t LEFT JOIN course c ON t.course_id = c.id WHERE t.course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
SELECT t.*, c.name AS course_name FROM training_task t LEFT JOIN course c ON t.course_id = c.id WHERE c.teacher_id = #{teacherId} ORDER BY t.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO training_task (course_id, title, description, requirements, deadline, status) VALUES (#{courseId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{requirements}, #{deadline}, #{status})
